'''zavafa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cracow|cracow]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-v-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cracow|cracow]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zavafa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zævæfæth|zævæfæth]] || [[word:zævæfæj|zævæfæj]] || [[word:zævæfæsh|zævæfæsh]] || [[word:zævæfæ|zævæfæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zavavafath|zavavafath]] || [[word:zavavafaj|zavavafaj]] || [[word:zavavafash|zavavafash]] || [[word:zavavafa|zavavafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zavafath|zavafath]] || [[word:zavafaj|zavafaj]] || [[word:zavafash|zavafash]] || [[word:zavafa|zavafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zavaffath|zavaffath]] || [[word:zavaffaj|zavaffaj]] || [[word:zavaffash|zavaffash]] || [[word:zavaffaf|zavaffaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zavafatha|zavafatha]] || [[word:zavafaja|zavafaja]] || [[word:zavafasha|zavafasha]] || [[word:zavafaka|zavafaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zavafath|zavafath]] || [[word:zavafaj|zavafaj]] || [[word:zavafash|zavafash]] || [[word:zavafa|zavafa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zavafathal|zavafathal]] || [[word:zavafajal|zavafajal]] || [[word:zavafashal|zavafashal]] || [[word:zavafakal|zavafakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zavafathatha|zavafathatha]] || [[word:zavafajaja|zavafajaja]] || [[word:zavafashasha|zavafashasha]] || [[word:zavafaka|zavafaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zavafathan|zavafathan]] || [[word:zavafajan|zavafajan]] || [[word:zavafashan|zavafashan]] || [[word:zavafakan|zavafakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zavafathaoro|zavafathaoro]] || [[word:zavafajaoro|zavafajaoro]] || [[word:zavafashaoro|zavafashaoro]] || [[word:zavafakaoro|zavafakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
